recommendations.recommendation: Improve server response time by using caching, optimizing database queries, or upgrading hosting.
Enable Gzip or Brotli compression on your server to reduce file sizes by 50-70%.
Implement browser caching using Cache-Control headers to improve repeat visit performance.
Use one H1 tag per page and maintain proper heading hierarchy (H1 → H2 → H3).
Add a meta description tag to improve search engine click-through rates.
Add Open Graph tags to control how your content appears when shared on social media.
